General.Name: Pet Service Holding N.V.
General.Description: Passat Société Anonyme engages in the image-assisted sale of consumer products in France. The company sells household, kitchen, DIY, garden, beauty, and leisure and fitness products. It also offers smart products designed to facilitate daily life, sourcing, marketing, and demonstration films for its customers. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Fourqueux, France.
General.Address: 1-3 rue Alfred de Vigny, Fourqueux, France, 78112
